name: Back-to-School Night Presentation
description: Create a 3-page Back-to-School Night presentation flipchart for a high school English class. On the first page, include the title "Welcome to English 10", teacher name "Ms. Rivera", room "Room 214", and a decorative shape. On the second page, titled "Grading", create five boxes for the following categories: Essays (30%), Participation (15%), Quizzes (15%), Projects (25%), and Homework (15%). On the third page, titled "Stay Connected", include the email "rivera@lincolnhs.edu" and list the dates for Progress Reports (September 15), Parent Conferences (October 20), and Final Exams (December 18). Save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/back_to_school_night.flipchart.
